arts.ttl: Ipswich XI vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Ipswich Town head to Fulham this afternoon aiming for a second successive West London scalp. Kieran McKenna’s team secured their first home win of the campaign last time out, as goals from Liam Delap and Omari Hutchinson earned an upset win over Chelsea. arts.ttl: Fulham vs Ipswich – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Fulham will look to continue their push for European football when Ipswich Town arrive at Craven Cottage on Sunday. Marco Silva’s side are unbeaten in seven Premier League games and win will take the Cottagers within two points of the Premier League’s top six. arts.ttl: Fulham plot move for James McAtee as out-of-favour Man City star considers future move amid lack of starting opportunities
